differential_diagnoses: Dilated cardiomyopathy of idiopathic or genetic etiology
Coronary artery embolism from a cardiac source
next_steps: Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi antibodies
Consider endomyocardial biopsy for histopathology and PCR for T. cruzi
Continue guideline-directed medical therapy for heart failure
Proceed with planned implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) placement
24-hour Holter monitoring to monitor for complex arrhythmias
